name: Invocation of Process Using Visible Sensitive Information
description: The product invokes a process with sensitive arguments (passwords, tokens, keys) passed via command-line parameters or environment variables that are visible to other local users through process listing tools such as ps or /proc.
detection_pattern: Look for INGRESS nodes (credentials, secrets, tokens) flowing into EXTERNAL nodes (process invocation, exec calls) via command-line arguments or environment variables without a TRANSFORM mediator (secret store lookup, stdin piping, temp file with restricted permissions) that prevents the sensitive data from appearing in the process table.
